category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-geiger detects unsafe Rust usage in a crate and its dependencies.
source_facts.homepage points to the official geiger-rs/cargo-geiger repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official geiger-rs/cargo-geiger repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; no dedicated docs URL is supplied in source_facts, so the official README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/geiger-rs/cargo-geiger, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions detecting unsafe Rust usage in crates and dependencies.
